title: Email Essentials
subtitle: Professional Emails — B1 — 60 minutes
fit:
<!-- SCENARIO FIT — Aula 9
Can-do: "I can write and answer a professional email with a formal greeting, a polite request, an attachment line, and a sign-off."
Gramatica-alvo: formal register markers (I am writing to..., Could you please..., Please find attached..., I look forward to..., Best regards) + formal vs informal contrasts.
Vocab-alvo: recipient, subject, attachment, greeting, request, reply, forward, sign-off.
Cenario escolhido: Nilo (CCO/advogado esportivo) escreve um email formal para a federacao parceira confirmando uma reuniao de compliance e revisa o rascunho com a colega Carla.
Por que elicita o alvo: escrever para uma federacao OBRIGA registro formal, pedido educado e fecho profissional. Aderencia >= 90%.
-->
<!-- CONTINUIDADE — Aula 9
Itens novos: recipient, subject, attachment, greeting, request, reply, forward, sign-off; formal register markers; formal vs informal.
Itens revisados (1-8): compliance (L7), governance/governing body (L8), must/should (L7).
Callback no warm-up: slide 2 retoma a Aula 8 ('you learned how decisions are governed; today you put a compliance request in a formal email') e compliance (L7).
-->
